title: ジャパンCの後に・これが“アタシ”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City wins first place in the Japan Cup and
basks in a rousing chorus of cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hears comments about her beauty, but this
time, she smiles. The stands erupt even louder in
response.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Impressed by her feat, I also tell her she's
beautiful, a compliment she again accepts with a
smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she doesn't care how others see her.
Pretty or not, she'll never give up running,
because as long as she's running, she's being true
to herself.
